promptPreview: Create a catchy, adorable LINE sticker-ready chibi illustration based on the reference image. Use the exact same character from the reference image, preserving the face impression, hairstyle, outfit silhouette, color palette, and key props. Character identity: 扇動役者. Archetype: 空気に火を入れるステージメーカー. Character description: 表情の切り替えが鮮やかで、ひと言で場の温度を変える華やかな女性。挑発と親しみやすさを同時に持つ。. Outfit and props: ワインレッドのショートジャケット、黒のシルクブラウス、細身のパンツ、大ぶりではないゴールドピアス。華やかだが動きやすい舞台感のある装い。. Color palette: wine red, black, gold. Make
negativePromptPreview: multiple characters, text, logo, watermark, speech bubble, cropped head, cropped feet, cut off limbs, broken hands, extra fingers, background clutter, baby proportions, realistic style, dull pose, static standing pose

notes.pose: a showman-like leap with one arm thrown wide, the other hand near the chest, one leg kicked outward, jacket and hair moving with energetic stage flair

transparentMethod: local flood fill background removal with sharp
